message:
feat(demo-showcase): enhance screens with tour mode and theme improvements

Core application changes:
- app.rs: Major refactoring for improved screen management and state handling
  (+636 lines with screen transitions, tour integration, theme switching)
- chrome.rs: Add new chrome component features
- cli.rs: Expand CLI argument parsing for new demo modes
- main.rs: Update entry point to support new features
- theme.rs: Add 40+ lines of theme configuration improvements
- tour.rs: Implement 78-line guided tour functionality for demo showcase

Screen implementations (crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/):
- code_explorer.rs: +385 lines of SQLite Query Lab enhancements including
  improved query templates, schema browsing, and EXPLAIN visualization
- dashboard.rs: Refined dashboard layout and widget placement
- data_viz.rs: Enhanced data visualization with new chart types
- file_browser.rs: Minor UX improvements
- forms_input.rs: Form validation and input handling refinements
- macro_recorder.rs: Expand macro recording capabilities
- markdown_live_editor.rs: Improved live preview and editing experience
- markdown_rich_text.rs: Enhanced rich text rendering
- mod.rs: Update screen registry with new screen types
- performance.rs: Performance monitoring screen updates
- performance_hud.rs: HUD overlay refinements
- shakespeare.rs: Add animated highlight pass and live search preparation
- table_theme_gallery.rs: NEW - 125-line table theme showcase screen
- terminal_capabilities.rs: Terminal detection improvements
- visual_effects.rs: Visual effects screen refinements
- widget_gallery.rs: Minor widget gallery updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-   36  Palette Evidence   Command palette evidence lab
-   37  Determinism Lab    Checksum equivalence + determinism proofs

 /// Parsed command-line options.

@@ -586,7 +586,9 @@ impl WidgetGallery {

             &Table::new(table_rows, widths)
                 .header(header)
-                .style(Style::new().fg(theme::fg::SECONDARY)),

             inner,
